interaction_phrase: was established by its two founding members
occurrence_sentence: Terra Quantum AG was established in 2019 by its two founding members, CEO Markus Pflitsch and Prof. Dr. Karl Eckstein, who acts as CLO.
Terra Quantum AG was established in 2019 by its two founding members, CEO Markus Pflitsch and Prof. Dr. Karl Eckstein, who acts as CLO.
